title: Expansion Z
description: Do you like playing Minecraft in a zombie apocalypse style? You might be interested in this mod
body:
**What does the mod add?**

The mod adds a new type of zombie called "The Crawling One," a zombie that drags itself across the ground using its arms.

**Recommendations:**

The mod is more suitable for world types and map styles with a zombie apocalypse theme, as it integrates better with the environment.

Compatible with mods like Sounds Physics Remastered and True Darkness; both mods work correctly with this mod.

**Extra:**

The mod is still in development and soon there will be more texture variety and new types of zombies.
Requires the Geckolib mod to work.
